title: Feature Request : Subitems will be opened by the default view
excerpt: Hi Monday.com! I have feature request for the subitems. It would be great to have choice to open the Subitems by default on the Default Views. So that informations will be showed up and no need to open one by one. thank …

posts.author: wikky-io (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Monday.com! I have feature request for the subitems. It would be great to have choice to open the Subitems by default on the Default Views. So that informations will be showed up and no need to open one by one. thank you
